alternatives.name: Wired alarmed exit bars (Von Duprin, Corbin Russwin, Sargent)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Requires conduit and cable at every door; licensed electrician; disruptive retrofit in occupied wards; no wireless campus dashboard

alternatives.name: Mechanical alarm guards, no IoT (GfS Basic, ABUS)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero remote monitoring; alarm event discoverable only on-site; no automated compliance documentation; maintenance requires physical inspection rounds

alternatives.name: Wireless electronic exit control (dormakaba SafeRoute, GEZE SecuLogic)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Higher unit cost; typically BACnet-integrated; more complex configuration and commissioning; heavier BMS dependency

alternatives.name: RTLS wander management (Securitas Healthcare, CenTrak, RF Technologies)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Patient-worn tag required; no physical door barrier; covers elopement but does not satisfy exit compliance documentation; ~3–5x higher system cost

alternatives.name: Manual patrol + paper inspection logs [Status Quo]
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero device cost; 100% labor-dependent; no real-time detection; patrol gaps expose liability; documented compliance gaps risk JCI non-conformance findings
